venn "Note-taking app features"
set notion   "Notion"
set obsidian "Obsidian"
set roam     "Roam"
set logseq   "Logseq"

notion only                       : 12
obsidian only                     : 8
roam only                         : 5
logseq only                       : 4
notion & obsidian                 : 3
notion & roam                     : 2
notion & logseq                   : 2
obsidian & roam                   : 3
obsidian & logseq                 : 4
roam & logseq                     : 3
notion & obsidian & roam          : 2
notion & obsidian & logseq        : 1
notion & roam & logseq            : 1
obsidian & roam & logseq          : 2
notion & obsidian & roam & logseq : 1
